widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走, dark, flashes

A 17 year old woman with long brown hair and blue eyes kneels in the sand with a stick, carefully writing her name beside the name of an 18 year old man with short black hair and green eyes. She wears a striped tank top and cutoff shorts. He stands nearby, watching with a smile, hoodie off and slung over his shoulder. Shot from above, the wet sand catching the reflection of their figures in the afternoon sun.
